name: programmatic-seo-engine
description: Programmatic SEO engine with Astro + Payload CMS

scripts.install:deps: cd apps/cms && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.build: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "cms" ]; then cd apps/cms && npm run build; else cd apps/web && npm run build; fi
scripts.start: if [ "$RAILWAY_SERVICE_NAME" = "cms" ]; then cd apps/cms && npm run start; else cd apps/web && npm run serve; fi
